model.quantization: upstream GGML F16 model with Float16 CoreML encoder

runtime.boundary: Node.js native addon using CoreML encoder plus whisper.cpp decoder

energy.notes: The repeatable powermetrics procedure is defined, but this baseline did not run with root privileges.

engineering_cost.conversion_effort: Existing GGML decoder and CoreML encoder conversion were reused; no model conversion was performed in this repository.
engineering_cost.update_cost: Two independently versioned artifacts and the whisper.cpp compatibility layer must move together; the benchmark fetcher now pins and verifies both trees.
engineering_cost.packaging_cost: The paired model artifacts occupy 2.90 GB and the measured process peaked near 1.94 GB RSS.

observations: The transcript was deterministic across all five measured repetitions.
This legacy API returns one final full-file segment with a time range and a constant confidence value; it exposes no volatile updates.
The first execution after downloading the CoreML bundle spent 121211.85225 ms compiling a new execution plan; the recorded cold load is a fresh process after that system cache existed.
A single English fixture establishes a runtime baseline but is not sufficient for product selection.
